message:
feat: include memories in export/import round-trip

bd export now includes persistent memories (from bd remember) as JSONL
lines with {"_type":"memory","key":"...","value":"..."}. bd import
detects these records and restores them via SetConfig, making
bd export | bd import a lossless round-trip for both issues and memories.

New flags:
- bd export --no-memories: exclude memories from export

Backward compatible: JSONL without _type fields imports as before.

Co-Authored-By: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
